info.title: Dailymotion API
info.description: Dailymotion Data API provides access to videos, channels, playlists, users, and comments on the Dailymotion platform. Supports field selection via the fields parameter on all endpoints.

get.description: Returns a list of videos matching the specified criteria.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

get.description: Returns details of a specific video by ID.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

get.description: Returns videos owned by the authenticated user.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

post.description: Upload a new video (requires getting an upload URL first).

url.description: URL of the video to upload

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

get.description: Returns videos of a specific user.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

get.description: Returns users that this user follows.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

get.description: Returns playlists of a specific user.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

get.description: Returns details of a specific playlist.
Returns videos in a specific playlist.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

get.description: Returns details of a specific channel.
Returns videos in a specific channel.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

get.description: Returns comments on a specific video.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

post.description: Post a comment on a video.

get.description: Returns a URL where you can upload a video file.

post.description: Exchange credentials for an OAuth access token.
